notable_excerpts: We have been ranked number one in India and number two globally in the Dow Jones Sustainability Index, DJSI 2024.
We are committed to maintaining our leadership in the telecom vertical and serving new and existing clients.
We are making concerted efforts to improve our organization and to drive productivity gains.
We have onboarded a new logo in Europe where we have been chosen by a large telco as their strategic partner.
We have expanded the leadership teams for our cybersecurity and risk management practice.
We have forged several new partnerships to enhance our capabilities and to expand our service offerings.

chain_of_thought: The transcript highlights Tech Mahindra's focus on sustainability, employee development, and governance practices. Environmental disclosures are limited but mention sustainability rankings. Social aspects emphasize employee and client engagement. Governance is strong with transparency and leadership focus.
